title: Sparkly Diamond's
description: Sparkly Diamond's is a pack that simply makes your diamond's in Minecraft look shinier and have more of that diamond shape we all know and love!
body:
This is Sparkly Diamond's.
This pack aims to make diamonds more shiny and revisits an old 1.14 texture with a little mix!

---
![Found Some!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adef58d0a52f5357573dd0fb798344f159080009_0.webp)

### Pack does not include changes to: tools, armor, etc. 

(although i plan to do something with those in the future!)

and since this is a texture changed only pack, theres no need to report any bugs!

Happy Mining!
